checks.title: Workflow Preservation
checks.plan_prompt: Confirm .env remains the developer-facing configuration file and that the change does not introduce runtime wrappers, process injection, or schema drift away from .env.example.
checks.spec_prompt: Describe the operator-visible flow that preserves the standard .env workflow.
checks.task_prompt: Add implementation and validation tasks for schema-preserving behavior.
checks.command_prompt: Avoid guidance that normalizes wrapper-based execution.

checks.title: Module Boundaries
checks.plan_prompt: Show how CLI routing, envfile parsing and writing, sync orchestration, and provider adapters stay in focused modules with explicit interfaces.
checks.task_prompt: Schedule work so cross-cutting logic is kept out of unrelated modules.

checks.title: Deterministic File Fidelity
checks.plan_prompt: Explain how the feature preserves ordering, comments, no-op stability, and accurate dry-run or diff behavior for every affected file path.
checks.spec_prompt: Define the user-visible expectations for no-op runs, previews, and file mutation trustworthiness.
checks.task_prompt: Include tests and validations for unchanged-file stability, comments, ordering, and accurate previews.
checks.command_prompt: Describe dry-run and diff output in terms of real mutations only.

checks.title: Test-First Reliability
checks.plan_prompt: Identify the failing-first unit, CLI, integration, or contract tests required for the change, including negative-path secret-handling coverage.
checks.task_prompt: Place failing automated tests before implementation tasks and include provider failure, redaction, and edge-case coverage.

checks.title: UX Consistency and Secret Safety
checks.principle: IV. Consistent UX and Secret-Safe Output
checks.plan_prompt: Define consistent status terms, exit codes, recovery guidance, and redaction behavior for every operator-visible path.
checks.spec_prompt: Capture the command vocabulary, actionable errors, and secret-safe output rules users will observe.
checks.task_prompt: Add work for UX copy, redaction, and operator-visible failure-path validation.
checks.command_prompt: Keep examples and instructions secret-safe and aligned with shared CLI wording.

checks.title: Performance and Dependency Budget
checks.principle: V. Performance Budgets and Minimal Dependencies
checks.plan_prompt: State the relevant latency, lookup, and dependency budget impacts and justify any new dependency or provider-call cost.
checks.spec_prompt: Define measurable performance expectations for affected user flows.
checks.task_prompt: Include benchmarking, measurement, or validation work for applicable performance and dependency constraints.
